name: Dnipro (Ukraine)
description: A white field charged at the centre with the arms of Dnipro.
history: Dnipro (founded as Yekaterinoslav in 1776 and renamed Dnipropetrovsk in 1926 before being shortened to Dnipro in 2016) is Ukraine's fourth-largest city and a centre of heavy industry on the middle Dnipro river. Its flag and arms reference the river and the city's Cossack and industrial heritage.
